name: Plank
description: Isometric core hold that builds total-body stability. The foundation of core training.
tips: Squeeze your glutes and brace your abs
Keep a neutral spine -- don't let hips sag or pike up
Breathe steadily, don't hold your breath

variants.name: Plank Shoulder Taps
variants.description: Alternate tapping opposite shoulder while holding plank. Anti-rotation challenge.

variants.name: Forearm Plank
variants.description: Resting on forearms instead of hands. More core, less wrist strain.
